snippet.title: Caterpillar's Global Marketing Strategy
snippet.description:
Caterpillar's global marketing strategy centers on heavy machinery and equipment. It emphasizes quality, durability, and reliability to meet global infrastructure needs. They establish a strong dealer network for localized support and adaptation to various markets. Caterpillar's brand reputation and commitment to sustainability contribute to its global success in construction and industrial sectors.

snippet.title: SMART-TD helps furloughed Union Pacific workers preserve rail careers
snippet.description: Union Pacific’s new CEO, Jim Vena, took charge in mid-August. Ten days later, 94 workers from various rail unions were furloughed, including some from the SMART Mechanical Division.  That’s when leaders from SMART-TD in Nebraska stepped in, helping give these workers a chance to preserve their rail careers.

snippet.title: CEO Eric Desaulniers on Caterpillar's Sustainability Showcase
snippet.description:
President & CEO Eric Desaulniers participated in Caterpillar’s Sustainability Showcase in February 2023. At the ‘Mine Site of the Future’ at Tucson Proving Ground in Arizona, the attendees witnessed CAT's first all-electric 793 mining truck prototype.

An early believer in heavy-duty electrification, NMG is delighted to work in collaboration with Caterpillar to bring its vision of the world's first all-electric open-pit mine to reality. We look forward to receiving zero-emission machines for testing at our Matawinie Mine helping further our responsible mining practices and curbing our carbon footprint thanks to Québec's clean hydropower.

Let's electrify America ! ⚡

snippet.title: How Caterpillar Links Data and Expertise to Predict Repairs

In this talk, Senior Data Scientist at Caterpillar, Davide Gerbaudo, illustrates how a century-old company like Caterpillar combines its domain knowledge with data to develop modern analytics that provides value to the enterprise, its dealership network, and its customers. snippet.title: $CAT Caterpillar Inc Q2 2023 Earnings Conference Call
snippet.description:
08/01/2023 Q&A: 29:34
Caterpillar Inc. manufactures and sells construction and mining equipment, off-highway diesel and natural gas engines, industrial gas turbines, and diesel-electric locomotives in the United States and internationally. Its Construction Industries segment offers asphalt pavers, compactors, road reclaimers, forestry machines, cold planers, material handlers, tractors, excavators, telehandlers, motor graders, and pipelayers; compact track and multi-terrain, wheel, track-type, backhoe, and skid steer loaders; and related parts and tools. The company's Resource Industries segment provides electric rope and hydraulic shovels, draglines, rotary drills, hard rock vehicles, tractors, mining trucks, longwall miners, wheel loaders, off-highway and articulated trucks, wheel tractor scrapers and dozers, fleet management products, landfill and soil compactors, machinery components, autonomous ready vehicles and solutions, work tools, and safety services and mining performance solutions, as well as related parts and services. Its Energy & Transportation segment offers reciprocating engine powered generator sets; reciprocating engines, drivetrain, and integrated systems and solutions; turbines, centrifugal gas compressors, and related services; and diesel-electric locomotives and components, and other rail-related products. The company's Financial Products segment provides operating and finance leases, installment sale contracts, repair/rebuild financing services, working capital loans, and wholesale financing; and insurance and risk management products and services. Its All Other operating segment offers filters and fluids, undercarriage, ground engaging tools, fluid transfer products, precision seals, and rubber sealing and connecting components; parts distribution; integrated logistics solutions and distribution services; brand management and marketing strategy services; and digital investments services. Caterpillar Inc. was founded in 1925 and is headquartered in Irving, Texas.

snippet.title: Why Deflation Matters: What's Ahead for Stocks, Commodities, and Cryptos?
snippet.description:
Inflation. It's all anyone seems to be talking about in the financial world these days. For months now Matt has been saying that the worst of inflation is behind us and pounding the table on the imminent decline in consumer prices. So on this episode of Making Money With Matt McCall, Senior Macro Strategist at Bloomberg Intelligence Mike McGlone joins Matt to talk about "deflation."

Matt and Mike tackle a wide variety of topics – everything from stocks to gold, copper, and bitcoin (BTC). Mike shares why gold prices should head higher... why the world's largest crypto could climb to $100,000... and why copper is likely to hit $3 per pound before $5. If you have money in stocks, commodities, or cryptos, this is a show and interview you won't want to miss.

#gold #bitcoin #inflation

3:53 US Dollar Continues to Pull Back
5:52 What Would Keep Gold From Reaching New Highs?
8:22 "Fossil Fuel Deflation is Feeling Gold Inflation"

15:13 Copper's Correlation to the S&P 500
19:02 "Long Copper, Short Crude Oil"

snippet.title: Northstar Clean Technologies Presenting at the 2023 Kinvestor Days Conference
snippet.description:
Aidan Mills, President & CEO of Northstar Clean Technologies (TSXV: ROOF | OTCQB: ROOOF) joins host Arlen Hansen to discuss the Company and give a presentation at the 2023 Kinvestor Days Conference.

Northstar Clean Technologies Inc. is a Canadian-based clean technology company focused on the sustainable recovery and reprocessing of asphalt shingles. Northstar has developed a proprietary design process for taking discarded asphalt shingles, otherwise destined for already over-crowded landfills, and extracting the liquid asphalt for use in new hot mix asphalt, shingle manufacturing and asphalt flat roof systems, and aggregate and fiber for use in construction products and other industrial applications. Focused on the circular economy, Northstar plans to reprocess used or defective asphalt shingle waste back into its three primary components for reuse/resale at its first commercial scale up facility in Calgary, Alberta. As an emerging innovator in sustainable processing, Northstar's mission is to be the leader in the recovery and reprocessing of asphalt shingles in North America, extracting the recovered components from asphalt shingles that would otherwise be sent to landfill.  Please note, Kin Communications, operator of the Kinvestor Network, is compensated by Northstar Clean Technologies to provide investor relations services.

Learn more: https://www.northstarcleantech.com/
Northstar on Twitter: https://twitter.com/nstarcleantech
